title: clematis cylindrica var. walteri
intro: Clematis cylindrica var. walteri, also known as the Walter's clematis or cylindrical clematis, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of clematis cylindrica var. walteri include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
